title: montanoa tomentosa subsp. microcephala
intro: Montanoa tomentosa subsp. microcephala, also known as small-headed Montanoa, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Montanoa tomentosa subsp. microcephala include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and easing respiratory distress, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
